{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abidan artifact
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|There may be more [[Abidan]] artifacts on [[Cradle]] than [[Monarch]] weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A low-level [[Abidan artifact]] is rumored to be in the [[Rosegold]] museum.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] attempted to replicate an [[Abidan artifact]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan felt the power in his [[Abidan artifact]] flickering.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
